prompt: In the attached subject photo, you are looking for 10 types of casual and fashionable clothes that are suitable for the subject to wear. Each type of clothing is worn as a whole, but the pose, expression, and facial expression of the subject should not be the same as the attached photo but the facial structure is maintained. Each 10 outfits are distinguished by pose and expression, and the pose, expression, and type of clothing as a whole should not look monotonous and stiff. Similarly, you provide suggestions for 10 casual clothes that are not recommended for the subject to wear, but 10 clothes that are not recommended for the subject to wear are also suggested. Portrait-sized scrapbook-style poster, everything in the poster is arranged precisely, neatly, and orderly. The poster visual should not look stiff and monotonous, place the subject reference photo in the main part as a reference, do not change the arrangement of the face and outfit worn in the attached subject photo, 8K resolution. Face and body exactly same as uploaded image
